IDLE           ABT 0MT VLSFO +ABT 2.0MT LSMGO
ADDITIONAL  1.5MT LSMGO WHEN BALLASTING /DEBALLASTING
BUNKER SPECIFICATION:
IFO 380 CST – ISO RMG 380 AND MDO – ISO DMB ACCORDING TO ISO 8217:2017 (E) AND ALL SUBSEQUENT AMENDMENT THEREOF.
The VLSFO SUPPLIED SHOULD HAVE MINIMUM(NET) SPECIFIC ENERGY OF 40  MJ/KG AND A MAXMUM CCAI VALUE OF 850,AND MINIMUM 150 CST AT 50 DEGREE AND SULPHUR CONTECT LESS THAN 0.5% , THE LSMGO SHOULD HAVE SULPHUR CONTECT LESS THAN 0.1%,OTHERWISE OWNERS ARE NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR THE VESSEL’S SPEED AND CONSUMPTION PERFORMANCE.
VESSEL IS ENTITLED TO BURN MDO FOR MAIN ENGINE WHEN MANOEUVER IN/OUT OF PORTS/BERTHS/NARROW WATERS/CHANNELS/CANALS/RIVERS/ STRAITS / COASTAL WATERS/CONFINED OR RESTRICTED/SHALLOW WATER, ADVERSE-BAD WEATHER/ ROUGH SEAS/ BALLAST WATER EXCHANGE, BALLASTING AND DEBALLASTING OPERATIONS AND STOPPING/ STARTING THE ENGINES.ANDIN CASE OF SAFETY AND EMERGENCY.
SPEED /CONS ARE EFFECTIVE FOR VOYAGES EXCEEDING 48 HOURS TRANSIT TIME FROM SEA PILOT TO SEA PILOT. SPEED AND CONSUMPTION FIGURES IS GIVEN AND DETERMINED BASIS GOOD WEATHER CONDITIONS, NOT EXCEEDING WINDS BEAUFORT FORCE 4 AND DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3, WITH WAVE AND SWELL COMBINED HEIGHT NOT TO EXCEED 1.25 MTRS AND NO ADVERSE INFLUENCE OF CURRENTS/SWELL IN 24 CONSECUTIVE HOURS IN DEEP WATERS WITH CLEAN BOTTOM, SEA BUOY TO SEA BUOY, EXCLUDING CANALS, NARROW AND RESTRICTED WATERS AND PERIODS WHEN SPEED IS REDUCED DUE TO CHTRS' ORDERS, REASONS OF SAFETY AND POOR VISIBILITY ETC.
SPEED IS NOT TO BE DEBITED DUE TO FAVORABLE CURRENTS, AND A CURRENT FACTOR IS NOT TO BE APPLIED TO INCREASE THE WARRANTED SPEED ON STEAMING DAYS DURING WHICH THE VESSEL EXPERIENCED FAVORABLE CURRENT. NOEXTRAPOLATIONS / ASSUMPTIONS TO BE MADE FOR WEATHER / SEA CONDITIONS OTHER THAN THOSE DESCRIBED ABOVE.ABOUT ISUNDERSTOOD TO MEAN 0.5KTS DOWNWARDS IN THE SPEED AND 5% UPWARDS IN THE CONSUMPTION.
